title: 2025-07-21 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 4.79
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2025-07-21: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 4.79/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2025-07-21, the score printed 4.79/100 in the low regime, with volatility and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
